name: cellarapp
description: Fullstack Wine Cellar App (React Native client + Express/Prisma server + Postgres in Docker)

scripts.client:ios: cd client && npx react-native run-ios --simulator='iPhone 17 Pro Max'
scripts.wineapp:start: concurrently "npm run db" "npm run server" "npm run client:ios"

author: Daniel Saggir
